title: VALUES multiple inserts error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data(id INT, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_multiples(count_all INT, count_distinct INT);
INSERT INTO test_multiples(count_all, count_distinct) SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM test_data;
INSERT INTO test_multiples(count_all, count_distinct) SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM test_data;
key_bug_features: INSERT with SELECT from multiple rows causes error
